creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Acknowledged, but this cannot be fixed in the package. The flavored package in itself works fine.

This is a shortcoming of the current pkg/binary packages/portsbuilding infrastructure and features. You either need to install ports from source, and/or file a bug against the "Package Infrastructure" instead, because it does not permit alternative providers for the same requirement.  And there, it is not specific to alternative flavours of e2fsprogs.
